prompt: Generate a chatbot system UI screenshot with a 3D cartoon avatar portrait profile view, using the clean rendering style and friendly expression from the reference image.
searchQueryGenerated: professional software interface screenshot high resolution
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a chatbot system user interface. The UI must include a 3D cartoon avatar, presented as a head-and-shoulders portrait, matching the slightly turned perspective, clean rendering style, and friendly, subtle smile of the avatar in image 1. The avatar should be clearly integrated within the UI, serving as a profile picture or primary chatbot persona.
objects: Avatar with a slightly turned perspective
Avatar with a clean rendering style
Avatar with a friendly, subtle smile
Avatar integrated within the UI as a profile picture or primary chatbot persona
